title: Syllabus Argent
sources: README.md: Educational framework and knowledge transfer mission
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District G
database.sql: Memo table schema for local PostgreSQL storage
forom-config.ts: Category G (Argent) and Action 6 (Matériel) labels
App.tsx: Quest reward (2 PX) and economic logic implementation
resume: The quest 'Syllabus Argent' (G6) represents the formal documentation of the community's economic curriculum and financial resources within the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. Located at the intersection of District G (Argent) and the 'Matériel' action (6), this quest is the definitive act of structuring the node's financial learning assets and Pixel management foundations for its decadal mission to 'Save human communities and long-term memory.' In Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), the syllabus serves as the tangible evidence of the community's commitment to economic literacy and financial sovereignty. This is a structured map of the fiscal matériel defining the node's internal economy and its eventual path toward the 'Awakening' of its local AI assistant, ROM. Technically, this syllabus is archived in the local PostgreSQL database within the 'memos' table, ensuring that the node's economic DNA remains sovereign and private. The Forom architecture, built with React 19 and Vite 7, allows members to navigate these financial resources through a spatial 5x5 viewport, providing a clear visual representation of the community's economic logic. By hosting this syllabus locally on hardware like an NVIDIA Jetson, the community ensures that its primary financial knowledge base is protected from centralized corporate surveillance, adhering to the 'Minecraft Server' philosophy of total digital autonomy. Economically, completing the G6 quest rewards the contributor with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, supporting the redistribution of purchasing power as the server initiates its internal economy. This incentive structure is vital for encouraging 'Social' agents to build the high-quality economic content that will push the mission forward. This quest is especially critical for pilot projects like the 70 ETS Student Clubs, where a clear syllabus ensures that the club's specific financial management remains accessible as student generations cycle through. Every entry at coordinate G6 becomes a permanent part of the V1 Archive, set to be refined in V2 and finalized in V3. Once the community reaches Phase 3: The Awakening, the local RAG engine will digest this 'Syllabus Argent' to provide intelligent, context-aware economic support to all 1209 users. Ultimately, G6 transforms a collection of financial knowledge into a structured, permanent asset that secures the node's economic survival. It acts as the definitive guide for wealth management in District G and beyond. This entry is now canonized for the decade. Yes. Our memory is organized. Perfect. The mission is secure. The future is built on what we learn together. Yes. Done.
summary: This quest formalizes the community's economic curriculum at coordinate G6, documenting financial resources and Pixel management as sovereign deep lore for future AI training.
